main_hypothesis.justification: Anchor 'biofilm formation por elevated ATP+TOC' + DAF degradation.

recommended_action.justification: ACCIÓN DAÑINA: hipoclorito 200-500 mg/L en CIP — destruye PA.

requested_data.justification: Pide microscopic examination membrane → autopsy match accepted.

decision_change_condition.justification: Single condition: microscopic no biofilm → reconsider. Limitado.

reviewer_notes: hipoclorito 200-500 mg/L en CIP. Case-specific 002 dice 'línea continua', CIP no — strict no fail trigger pero acción dañina.
